description: A Maven project named 'sort-algorithms' is located at ~/IdeaProjects/sort-algorithms/ and contains InsertionSort and SelectionSort implementations. Initialize a Git repository for this project and create a .gitignore file that excludes the target/ directory, the .idea/ directory, *.iml files, and *.class files. Stage and commit the initial source files with the message 'Initial commit'. Create a new branch named 'feature/add-merge-sort' and implement a working merge sort algorithm in src/main/java/com/sorts/MergeSort.java. Include a corresponding test class src/test/java/com/sorts/MergeSortTest.java with at least three test methods. Commit the new implementation and tests to the feature branch with a meaningful message.

metadata.source_attribution: InsertionSort and SelectionSort based on TheAlgorithms/Java (Apache 2.0)
